message:
Fix critical bugs found in context management review

- Fix pressure cascade: invalidate lastInputTokens before running
  compaction layers so between-layer pressure checks use char/4
  (reflects in-place mutations) instead of stale API measurements
- Fix safeCutoff: walk past TurnSteering (not just TurnTool), enforce
  minimum cutoff of 1, return -1 sentinel when no safe position exists
- Fix checkpoint task extraction: scan history[:cutoff] only so
  follow-up user messages in preserved section don't override the
  original task
- Fix short result masking: skip masking when summary is longer than
  original content (e.g. "OK" → "[edit_file: auth.go → OK]")
- Scope TaskStore by session ID: each session gets its own task file
  at .serf/tasks/<sessionID>.json, ensuring isolation
- Remove dead code: MaybeCompact error return (always nil),
  maskObservations/clearThinking int returns (unused), isError param
  on summarizeToolResult (unreachable — errors skipped by caller)
- Add integration tests for L1→L3 interaction with masked shell exit
  codes and L4 summarization through the orchestrator

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
